mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_user_profile(user_id, nickname, avatar_path, bio) VALUES(#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarPath}, #{bio})
INSERT INTO forum_user_profile(user_id, nickname, avatar, bio) VALUES(#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarPath}, #{bio})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_user_profile SET nickname = #{nickname}, bio = #{bio} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE forum_user_profile SET avatar_path = #{avatarPath} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE forum_user_profile SET avatar = #{avatarPath} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, nickname, avatar_path, bio, last_login_ip, last_login_at FROM forum_user_profile WHERE nickname IN
#{nickname}
